Footer.aboutText: A Santa Barbara, Oxnard & Ventura professional group of lawyers specializing in Personal injury, Vehicular Accidents, Wrongful Death and Workers’ Compensation cases.

Hero.description: The Law Office of Osbelia Castillo delivers elite defense strategies with <precision>surgical precision</precision> and bilingual expertise.
Hero.ariaCall: Call Osbelia Castillo for a Free Consultation at 805-283-7656
Hero.ariaSubmit: Submit your request for a free legal consultation

About.title: About Osbelia Castillo
About.p1: For over five years, Osbelia has worked as an aggressive civil litigator representing insurance companies in both state and federal court. She has handled hundreds of personal injury cases including catastrophic injuries, wrongful deaths, and complex liability cases.
About.p2: Her experience representing insurance companies gives her an <edge>edge</edge> when fighting for her injured clients. Her background on the defense side provides a unique perspective to achieve favorable results at an early stage.
About.ariaProfile: View the full legal profile and biography of Osbelia Castillo

PracticeAreas.title: Practice Areas
PracticeAreas.subtitle: Dedicated to your recovery.
PracticeAreas.piDesc: Handling catastrophic injuries with an aggressive approach to secure the compensation you deserve.
PracticeAreas.vaDesc: Expert representation for highway collisions, side-street accidents, and complex parking lot cases.
PracticeAreas.wdDesc: Compassionate legal support for families seeking justice after the loss of a loved one due to negligence.
PracticeAreas.wcDesc: Protecting your right to a safe workplace and ensuring full benefits for on-the-job injuries.

Contact.description: We take the time to examine every detail of your case. Let us guide you through your legal options with clarity and dedication.

Process.title: Defining Goals, Method & Success Together
Process.p1: By conducting various internal investigation activities and implementing risk management assessments, our approach saves our clients time and money over the long term.
Process.p2: Organically grow the holistic world view of disruptive innovation via workplace diversity and empowerment.

metadata.title: Osbelia Castillo | Founding Attorney | Personal Injury Specialist
metadata.description: Meet Osbelia Castillo, founding attorney of The Law Office of Osbelia Castillo. With over 5 years of experience in civil litigation and insurance defense, she fights for maximum recovery for personal injury victims. Bilingual advocacy in English and Spanish.

hero.quote: Having seen how insurance companies defend claims from the inside, I now use that knowledge to fight for the maximum recovery for my clients.

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.p1: For over five years, Osbelia has worked as an aggressive civil litigator representing insurance companies in both state and federal court. She has handled hundreds of personal injury cases including catastrophic injuries, wrongful deaths, and complex liability cases.
profile.p2: Her experience representing insurance companies gives her an <edge>edge</edge> when fighting for her injured clients. Her background on the defense side provides a unique perspective to achieve favorable results at an early stage.

metadata.title: Mark Kenneth Flores | Attorney, Founding Partner | Personal Injury Specialist
metadata.description: Attorney Mark Kenneth Flores, founder & partner at Crane Flores Injury & Car Accident Lawyers, represents clients throughout Ventura & Santa Barbara County.

hero.quote: Mr. Flores has exclusively practiced in the area of personal injury litigation for more than 20 years.

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.p1: Attorney Mark Kenneth Flores is a founding partner of Crane Flores Injury & Car Accident Lawyers. Mr. Flores has exclusively practiced in the area of personal injury litigation for more than 20 years. Prior to starting his practice on the Central Coast, he worked at some of the largest and most successful personal injury law firms in Los Angeles.
profile.p2: Mr. Flores is capable of handling any type of personal injury or wrongful death claim, from motor vehicle accidents to asbestos-induced mesothelioma.

future.title: Securing Your Family's Future
future.description: While no amount of money can replace a loved one, a wrongful death claim can provide the financial security your family needs to survive and thrive following a tragic loss.
future.survivalDesc: Claims for the victim's pre-death suffering.
future.consortiumDesc: Justice for the loss of companionship and care.
future.earningsDesc: Recovering future income lost due to the death.
future.funeralDesc: Coverage for final medical and burial expenses.

metadata.title: Workers' Compensation Lawyers | Santa Barbara | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured at work? Our California workers' compensation attorneys protect your rights and ensure you receive maximum medical and financial benefits. Free consultation.

hero.title: Workplace
hero.subtitle: Injuries
hero.description: Protecting your rights and livelihood. We ensure you get the full medical and financial benefits you deserve under California law.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in California Workers' Compensation Law

benefits.title: Workers' Compensation Benefits
benefits.description: The workers' comp system is complex and often skewed in favor of employers. We rebalance the scales to ensure you receive full coverage for your workplace injuries.
benefits.lostWagesDesc: Compensation for time off work during recovery.
benefits.medicalCareDesc: Full coverage for surgery, therapy, and medications.
benefits.retrainingDesc: Vouchers for new skill training if you can't return to the same role.

filing.title: Filing Your Claim
filing.description: Timing is critical in workers' compensation cases. Follow these steps to protect your claim:
filing.step1: Report the injury to your employer immediately.
filing.step2: Seek medical evaluation from a certified provider.
filing.step3: Contact our office to file a formal DWC-1 form.
filing.step4: Document all symptoms and treatment interactions.

section1.title: Justice for Occupational Exposure
section1.p1: Exposure to asbestos can lead to devastating health conditions, often appearing decades after the truth was hidden by employers and manufacturers.
section1.p2: We understand the specialized nature of mesothelioma claims and fight for the resources your family needs.

items.item2: Expediting recovery through established bankruptcy trusts of responsible corporations.
items.item4: Connecting victims with leading oncologists and pulmonary experts for diagnosis and care.
items.item6: Holding construction and manufacturing companies responsible for unsafe working conditions.

section3.title: Lifetime Advocacy
section3.p1: Ensuring long-term settlements that cover extensive medical needs and loss of consortium.

content.quote: Mesothelioma cases are highly technical. We have the experience and expert network required to handle the complex evidentiary standards of toxic tort law.

metadata.title: Oxnard Rollover Accident Lawyer | Osbelia Castillo | Personal Injury
metadata.description: Injured in a vehicle rollover in Oxnard? SUVs and trucks are high-risk. We use over 50 years of experience to hold negligent drivers and manufacturers accountable. Free consultation.

hero.title: Rollover
hero.subtitle: Accident Claims
hero.description: Vehicles with a high center of gravity, like SUVs and trucks, are prone to catastrophic rollovers. We provide elite legal advocacy to secure justice for life-altering injuries.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in Rollover Accident Claims

section1.title: The Physics of Negligence in Rollovers
section1.p1: Rollover accidents are among the most dangerous types of crashes on Oxnard roads. SUVs, commercial trucks, and 18-wheelers have a high center of gravity, making them susceptible to tipping if a driver speeds around turns or acts recklessly. When these accidents occur, the force involved often leads to devastating trauma.
section1.p2: The Law Office of Osbelia Castillo investigates the core cause of the roll—whether it was driver error, a mechanical defect, or poorly designed roadways. We use our defense-side insights to anticipate how insurance firms will try to blame the victim, and we shut down those tactics before they damage your claim.

items.item2: Holding drivers of high-profile vehicles accountable for failing to exercise caution during turns.
items.item4: Representing victims suffering from paralysis, TBIs, and complex spinal cord injuries.
items.item6: Seeking additional compensation for cases involving gross negligence or egregious reckless behavior.

section3.title: Aggressive Evidence Gathering
section3.p1: Proving liability in a rollover requires meticulous documentation. We gather witness statements, police reports, and accident reconstruction data to build an ironclad case. Our goal is to ensure you receive full financial relief for medical bills, lost wages, and emotional distress.

content.quote: A rollover happens in seconds, but the impact lasts a lifetime. We fight to ensure insurance companies respect the true value of your restoration.

metadata.title: Oxnard Underinsured Motorist Claim Lawyer | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured by a driver with little or no insurance? We help you maximize recovery through UM/UIM policies. Don't let your insurer lowball your own claim. Free consultation.

hero.title: UM/UIM
hero.subtitle: Motorist Claims
hero.description: California law requires insurers to offer protection against uninsured drivers. If your own insurance company is refusing to pay the full value of your safety net, we are here to hold them accountable.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in Uninsured & Underinsured Motorist Claims

section1.title: Protecting Your Right to the Coverage You Paid For
section1.p1: In California, uninsured/underinsured motorist (UM/UIM) coverage is a critical legal safeguard. Many drivers carry only minimum liability, which is rarely enough to cover catastrophic injuries. When you are hit by an uninsured driver or a fleeing hit-and-run motorist, your own policy is supposed to act as your shield.
section1.p2: The Law Office of Osbelia Castillo understands that even your own insurance company is a for-profit entity that may try to minimize your settlement. We treat these claims with the same aggressive litigation strategies used in third-party lawsuits, ensuring your insurer fulfills its contractual obligations to you.

items.item2: Securing compensation for medical bills and trauma when the at-fault driver has zero insurance.
items.item4: Bridging the gap when the other driver's insurance limits are too low to cover your total damages.
items.item6: Aggressively pursuing claims when the responsible party remains unidentified after a collision.

section3.title: Maximizing Your Compensation
section3.p1: Proving fault is still required in UM/UIM claims. We conduct deep investigations to establish negligence, preventing your insurer from using technicalities to deny your financial relief for medical bills, lost wages, and permanent disability.

content.quote: Your UM/UIM policy is a safety net you've already paid for. Our mission is to make sure that net is strong enough to catch your future.

section1.p1: Brain and spinal cord injuries often involve permanent changes to one's quality of life.
section1.p2: Our firm understands the medical complexities and the lifelong costs associated with these catastrophic events.

items.item2: Collaborating with neurologists and life-care planners to document the full scope of your needs.
items.item4: Calculating decades of medical expenses, therapy, and adaptive equipment.
items.item6: Addressing the impact on your ability to work and providing resources for retraining.

section3.title: Maximum Legal Recovery
section3.p1: Using aggressive litigation to ensure insurance companies pay for the lifetime of care required.

content.quote: We don't just fight for a settlement; we fight for your family's long-term security and dignity after a life-altering injury.

metadata.title: Distracted Driving & Cell Phone Accident Lawyer | Oxnard
metadata.description: Injured by a driver texting or using a phone? Our Oxnard legal team holds distracted drivers accountable using digital forensics and aggressive litigation. Free consultation.

hero.title: Cell Phone Use
hero.subtitle: & Driver Negligence
hero.description: Studies prove cell phone use impairs driving more than alcohol. We treat this negligence with the seriousness it deserves, fighting to recover the full value of your claim.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in Distracted Driving Car Accidents

section1.title: The Epidemic of Distracted Driving
section1.p1: Every year, over 1.6 million crashes involve drivers distracted by texting or mobile devices. In Oxnard and throughout Ventura County, these avoidable tragedies occur because drivers prioritize screens over safety.
section1.p2: The Law Office of Osbelia Castillo uses a 'Negligence Per Se' approach. Since California law prohibits handheld device use, a driver violating this law is often automatically considered negligent. We investigate phone records and data timestamps to prove the other party was distracted at the moment of impact.

items.item2: Subpoenaing mobile records to establish the timeline of distraction and prove liability.
items.item4: Leveraging California's strict electronic device laws to simplify the path to recovery.
items.item6: Ensuring our Spanish-speaking community receives elite representation against major insurance carriers.

section3.title: California's Strict Electronic Laws
section3.p1: California mandates hands-free equipment for all adults and prohibits any device use for drivers under 18. If a driver was writing, sending, or reading a text, their negligence is clear. We guide you through the process of holding them financially responsible for your medical bills and trauma.

content.quote: Distracted driving is a choice. Our mission is to send a clear message through aggressive litigation: cell phone use and driving do not mix.

section1.title: Justice for Unsafe Products
section1.p1: When you buy a product, you have the right to expect it is safe for its intended use.
section1.p2: Whether it's a defective auto part, a dangerous household appliance, or unsafe medication, we take on the large corporations responsible for your harm.

items.item2: Holding manufacturers responsible for design and manufacturing defects.
items.item4: Fighting against dangerous products that lack proper safety warnings.
items.item6: Cases involving defective airbags, tires, and mechanical failures.

section3.title: Corporate Accountability
section3.p1: Proving that a company knew of defects but failed to issue a recall.

content.quote: Pharmaceutical companies and manufacturers have a duty to ensure their products don't harm consumers. We hold them accountable when they prioritize profits over patient safety.

section1.p1: California law follows a strict liability rule for dog bites. This means owners are responsible for the injuries their pets cause.

items.item2: Advocating for victims who require plastic surgery or long-term wound care.

section3.title: Infection & Long-term Care
section3.p1: Ensuring your settlement covers all medical treatments, including specialized therapy.

metadata.title: Slip and Fall Accident Attorneys | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured on someone else's property? Our Santa Barbara slip and fall lawyers hold negligent property owners accountable. Free consultation.

hero.title: Slip and Fall
hero.subtitle: Accident Attorneys
hero.description: Recovering justice for premises liability victims in Santa Barbara, Oxnard, and Ventura.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Slip and Fall & Premises Liability Law Expert

section1.title: Premises Liability
section1.p1: Premises liability arises when an injury is caused by an unsafe or defective condition on someone's property.
section1.p2: Owners have the legal duty to keep their property safe for visitors and warn of any potential hazards.

items.item2: Broken sidewalks, poor lighting, and wet floors are common causes of premises liability claims.
items.item4: Owners must maintain safe environments and warn visitors of any known dangers.
items.item6: We demonstrate that the owner knew or should have known about the risk and failed to fix it.

section3.title: Negligence Litigation
section3.p1: Holding negligent property managers and owners accountable for your medical recovery.

content.quote: Premises liability cases require immediate investigation. We secure the evidence needed to prove the property was unsafe.

metadata.title: Elder & Dependent Abuse Lawyers | Santa Barbara | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Protecting the rights of seniors and dependent adults. Our Santa Barbara attorneys hold nursing homes and caregivers accountable for neglect and abuse. Free consultation.

hero.title: Elder & Dependent
hero.subtitle: Abuse
hero.description: Every individual deserves to live with dignity and safety. When trust is broken by caregivers or facilities, we provide the aggressive advocacy needed to protect your loved ones and secure justice.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in Elder Abuse & Dependent Care Law

section1.title: Compassionate Advocacy for the Vulnerable
section1.p1: Elder and dependent abuse is a heartbreaking betrayal of trust that can occur in nursing homes, assisted living facilities, or even within the home. Whether the harm is physical, emotional, or financial, victims and their families deserve a legal team that acts with urgency and precision.
section1.p2: Our firm is dedicated to uncovering the truth behind facility negligence. We investigate every detail to hold responsible parties accountable for the harm they have caused to those who often cannot speak for themselves.

items.item2: Unexplained injuries like bedsores, broken bones, or sudden, drastic changes in mood and personality.
items.item4: Sudden changes in bank accounts, missing property, or unauthorized changes to legal documents and wills.
items.item6: Improper medication dosing, missed treatments, or failure to provide a reasonable standard of care.

section3.title: Decades of Dedicated Service
section3.p1: With over 50 years of collective legal experience, our attorneys possess the deep knowledge required to navigate the complexities of elder law and facility liability throughout California.

content.quote: Our elders deserve to spend their golden years in safety. We stand as a shield for those who cannot protect themselves against the tragedy of neglect.

metadata.title: Construction Site Accident Lawyers | Santa Barbara | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured at a construction site? Our Santa Barbara attorneys handle complex personal injury and third-party liability claims for workers and pedestrians. Free consultation.

hero.title: Construction Site
hero.subtitle: Accidents
hero.description: Construction zones are high-risk environments where negligence can lead to life-altering trauma. We provide the aggressive advocacy needed to navigate both personal injury and third-party liability claims.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in Construction Site Accident Law

section1.title: Navigating the Complexities of Site Liability
section1.p1: Construction sites are inherently dangerous, and accidents can impact workers, contractors, and even passing pedestrians. Determining the right legal path—whether it is a standard workers' compensation claim or a third-party personal injury lawsuit—is essential to ensuring you receive the full scope of benefits you deserve.
section1.p2: While workers' comp covers basic medical costs and a portion of lost wages, a personal injury claim against a negligent contractor or equipment manufacturer can provide additional recovery for pain, suffering, and reduced quality of life. In Santa Barbara, we investigate the root cause of every site accident to protect our clients' long-term interests.

items.item2: If faulty machinery or defective safety equipment caused your injury, you may have the right to sue the manufacturer for damages beyond workers' compensation.
items.item4: Contractors have a duty to secure sites and warn the public of hazards. Falling debris or unmarked hazards often lead to valid claims for injured passersby.
items.item6: We hold builders and site managers accountable for failing to follow safety protocols or properly securing heavy equipment and structural components.

section3.title: Over 50 Years of Collective Legal Wisdom
section3.p1: Our firm leverages five decades of experience to dismantle the complex defenses used by large construction firms. We work on a contingency basis, ensuring you have access to premier legal representation while you focus on your physical recovery.

content.quote: Safety protocols are not suggestions—they are legal requirements designed to protect lives. We ensure those who cut corners are held responsible.

faqs.title: Construction Accidents: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: What should I do immediately after a construction accident?
faqs.a1: Seek medical care immediately, even if your injuries seem minor. Document the scene with photos, get witness contact details, and report the incident to your supervisor or the site manager to ensure an official record exists.
faqs.q2: Can I file a lawsuit if I am already receiving workers' comp?
faqs.a2: You generally cannot sue your direct employer, but you can file a 'third-party' lawsuit if a separate contractor, property owner, or equipment manufacturer's negligence contributed to your accident.
faqs.q3: How long do I have to file my claim in California?
faqs.a3: For personal injury claims, the deadline is typically two years. However, if a government entity is involved, you may have as little as six months to file a formal notice of claim.
faqs.q4: What compensation can I expect to recover?
faqs.a4: Depending on the type of claim, you can recover medical expenses, a portion of lost wages, and in personal injury cases, compensation for pain, suffering, and emotional distress.

section1.title: Protecting the Rights of Industrial Accident Victims
section1.p1: Construction sites are among the most hazardous work environments, and crane accidents are particularly devastating. Whether caused by mechanical failure, improper weight loads, or lack of proper training, these incidents leave victims facing immense physical and financial challenges. In Santa Barbara, we stand as a shield for those harmed on the job.
section1.p2: Our legal team conducts a meticulous examination of all evidence, including crane maintenance logs, operator certifications, and site safety records. We work to uncover the root cause of the failure to ensure that every negligent party—from the site manager to the equipment manufacturer—is held accountable.

section2.title: Steps to Take Following a Construction Site Incident

items.item2: Your health is the priority. Emergency room documentation is also the most critical evidence linking your injuries to the site accident.
items.item4: Notify your employer and Cal/OSHA immediately. If possible, take photos of the crane, the rigging, and the surrounding environment.
items.item6: Avoid making statements to insurance adjusters or signing 'incident reports' that may waive your rights before speaking with an attorney.

section3.title: Expertise in Complex Industrial Litigation
section3.p1: With over 50 years of collective legal experience, our firm understands the nuances of industrial liability. We leverage industry experts to substantiate your claim and fight for the maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, and long-term rehabilitation.

content.quote: Worker safety is a legal obligation, not a choice. We stand with those who have been injured when safety protocols are ignored.

faqs.title: Crane Accidents: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: How long do I have to file a crane accident claim?
faqs.a1: In California, you typically have two years from the date of the injury to file a claim. However, cases involving government entities or specific workers' comp rules may have much shorter deadlines (often 6 months), so act quickly.
faqs.q2: Can I recover compensation if I was partially at fault?
faqs.a2: Yes. California follows a comparative negligence rule. You can still recover damages even if you shared some responsibility, though your award will be reduced by your percentage of fault.
faqs.q3: What if the accident was caused by a mechanical defect?
faqs.a3: If the crane itself was poorly designed or manufactured, you may have a 'product liability' claim against the equipment maker in addition to your standard injury claim.
faqs.q4: What compensation is available for my injuries?
faqs.a4: Victims can seek recovery for all medical expenses, lost current and future income, pain and suffering, and the long-term cost of physical therapy or home modifications.

faqs.title: Forklift Accidents: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: What should I do immediately after a forklift accident?
faqs.a1: Seek medical attention immediately to document your injuries. Report the incident to your supervisor and Cal/OSHA, and if possible, take photos of the machinery and the surrounding scene.
faqs.q2: Can I file a claim if I am already receiving Workers' Comp?
faqs.a2: Yes. While you generally cannot sue your employer, you may have a 'third-party' personal injury claim if the accident was caused by a contractor or a defective machine part, allowing for additional compensation.
faqs.q3: How quickly do I need to act after an industrial injury?
faqs.a3: Industrial evidence, like maintenance logs and surveillance video, can be lost quickly. Contacting an attorney immediately allows us to issue preservation notices to protect your case.
faqs.q4: What compensation can I recover for my injuries?
faqs.a4: You can seek recovery for medical expenses, lost current and future wages, pain and suffering, and the long-term costs of rehabilitation or permanent disability.

faqs.title: Catastrophic Injury: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.a1: A catastrophic injury is one that has a permanent, severe impact on a person's life, typically preventing them from returning to work or performing daily activities without assistance. This includes TBI, paralysis, and severe burns.
faqs.q2: How does California's comparative negligence rule affect my case?
faqs.a2: California allows you to recover compensation even if you were partially at fault for the accident. Your final award is simply reduced by your percentage of responsibility.
faqs.q3: What can I expect during the litigation process?
faqs.a3: We handle every step: from investigation and evidence gathering to intense negotiations with insurance firms and, if necessary, taking your case to trial to ensure a fair outcome.

faqs.title: Police Misconduct: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.a1: It involves the use of unnecessary or excessive force—physical violence or weapon discharge—that goes beyond the scope of an officer's duty. It also includes constitutional violations like unlawful search and seizure.
faqs.q2: Is it difficult to sue a police department in California?
faqs.a2: Yes, government agencies often have 'qualified immunity.' However, California law allows for claims when clear misconduct or civil rights violations occur. These cases require immediate action and experienced legal counsel.

section3.title: A Proven Track Record of Success
section3.p1: With over 50 years of collective legal experience, our team has successfully navigated the intricate regulations surrounding California's transportation system. We represent victims on a contingency basis, meaning you focus on healing while we handle the legal burden.

content.quote: Public safety is a non-negotiable duty. We stand with victims to ensure that transit agencies fulfill their promise of safe transportation for all.

faqs.title: Bus Accidents: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: Is there a specific deadline for public transit claims?
faqs.a1: Yes. If the accident involves a government-operated bus, you typically have only six months to file a formal claim under the California Government Claims Act. Missing this deadline can permanently bar you from seeking compensation.
faqs.q2: What kind of evidence is critical in a bus crash?
faqs.a2: Onboard surveillance video, electronic data recorders (black boxes), and driver dispatch logs are vital. Because this data is often overwritten quickly, it is essential to have an attorney issue a preservation notice immediately.
faqs.q3: Can I seek compensation if I was injured while standing?
faqs.a3: Absolutely. Bus operators are required to provide 'utmost care' for all passengers. Sudden, aggressive maneuvers or stops that cause falls are often clear indicators of negligence.
faqs.q4: Does immigration status affect my right to a claim?
faqs.a4: No. In California, your immigration status is completely irrelevant to your right to seek compensation for injuries caused by another party's negligence.

metadata.title: Medical Device Recall Lawyers | Santa Barbara | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured by a recalled Jackson-Pratt (JP) 3-Spring Reservoir? Our Santa Barbara attorneys hold medical manufacturers accountable for sterilization failures and infections.

hero.title: Medical Device
hero.subtitle: Recalls
hero.description: Patients trust medical equipment to aid their recovery, not cause further harm. When manufacturers release unsterilized or defective devices, we provide the aggressive advocacy needed to secure justice.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in Medical Device & Product Liability Law

section1.title: Advocating for Victims of Sterile Processing Failures
section1.p1: The Jackson-Pratt (JP) 3-Spring Reservoir is a critical tool used to drain wounds post-surgery. However, recent recalls have highlighted a dangerous lapse in sterilization protocols, placing thousands of patients at risk of life-threatening infections. When a medical device fails to meet basic safety standards, the manufacturer must be held accountable.
section1.p2: In Santa Barbara, we represent individuals who have suffered complications due to these recalled kits. Our firm investigates the timeline of the defect and the manufacturer's failure to warn the public, ensuring that injured patients receive the compensation necessary for additional medical care and recovery.

section2.title: Recognizing the Risks of JP Reservoir Kits

items.item2: Unsterilized equipment can lead to severe surgical site infections, characterized by high fever, redness, and discolored discharge.
items.item4: If a wound infection is not treated aggressively, it can progress to sepsis, a life-threatening condition that leads to organ failure.
items.item6: Victims of defective medical devices often face additional surgeries and long-term antibiotic treatments to combat preventable infections.

section3.title: A Legacy of Challenging Large Corporations
section3.p1: With over 50 years of collective legal experience, our team has the resources to take on major medical manufacturers. We operate on a contingency basis, ensuring you have access to premier legal representation without any upfront costs.

content.quote: Medical safety is a right, not a privilege. We stand with patients to ensure that corporate negligence never goes unchecked.

faqs.title: Medical Device Recalls: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: How do I know if a recalled device was used in my surgery?
faqs.a1: Your surgical records and hospital discharge papers will list the specific medical instruments used. We can assist you in obtaining these records to confirm if your device was part of a recalled lot.
faqs.q2: What are the early warning signs of a device-related infection?
faqs.a2: Patients should monitor for high fevers, chills, excessive swelling at the wound site, or any unusual discharge. If you experience these symptoms, seek medical attention immediately.
faqs.q3: Can I sue even if the manufacturer issued a 'voluntary' recall?
faqs.a3: Yes. A voluntary recall does not absolve a company of liability for the harm their product caused before or during the recall process.
faqs.q4: What compensation is available for medical device injuries?
faqs.a4: You may seek recovery for additional medical bills, lost wages during your extended recovery, pain and suffering, and the long-term impact on your health.

metadata.title: Car Accident Liability Lawyers | Santa Barbara | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Struggling to prove fault after a crash? Our Santa Barbara car accident liability attorneys help you establish negligence and secure fair compensation. Free consultation.

hero.title: Car Accident
hero.subtitle: Liability
hero.description: Determining who is at fault is the most critical step in a personal injury claim. With over 50 years of collective experience, we use every resource to establish liability and protect your right to recovery.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in Car Accident Liability

section1.title: Strategic Advocacy to Establish Fault
section1.p1: Proving liability in a car accident requires more than just a statement; it requires a comprehensive legal strategy. Whether you were involved in a multi-car pileup or a side-swipe collision, insurance companies will often look for ways to shift blame. We are here to ensure the facts are presented clearly and your interests are defended.
section1.p2: The actions you take in the moments following a crash are vital. Our legal team reviews every detail—from black box data to witness statements—to build a foundation of evidence that holds negligent drivers accountable for the harm they have caused.

section2.title: Critical Steps to Protect Your Claim

items.item2: Always call the police. An official incident report provides a neutral third-party observation that is essential for proving your version of events.
items.item4: Take photos of the scene, all vehicles involved, and your injuries. Exchange information with other drivers but avoid discussing fault at the scene.
items.item6: Seek immediate care and document your treatment. Consistent medical records prevent insurance adjusters from claiming your injuries were unrelated to the crash.

section3.title: How Insurance Adjusters Determine Liability
section3.p1: Insurance companies analyze several factors to assess damages, including local traffic laws, the point of impact, and police reports. We work to identify errors in initial reporting and use credible evidence to ensure the true cause of the accident is recognized by all parties involved.

content.quote: Establishing the truth is the first step toward justice. We leave no stone unturned when it comes to proving liability and securing your future.

faqs.title: Car Accident Liability: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: What happens if the police report is wrong?
faqs.a1: Factual errors can often be corrected if you have credible evidence. For errors involving an officer's opinion, we can work to have your formal statement added to the record to provide a complete picture.
faqs.q2: Can I still recover compensation if I was partially at fault?
faqs.a2: Yes. California follows a comparative negligence rule, meaning you can still recover damages even if you were partially responsible, though your award may be reduced by your percentage of fault.
faqs.q3: Should I apologize to the other driver at the scene?
faqs.a3: No. While it is natural to be polite, an apology can be legally interpreted as an admission of fault. Stick to exchanging insurance and contact information only.
faqs.q4: How long do I have to file a claim in California?
faqs.a4: Generally, you have two years from the date of the accident to file a personal injury lawsuit. However, evidence disappears quickly, so it is best to start the process as soon as possible.

section1.p1: Boating accidents often result in devastating injuries and complex legal challenges. Whether on a lake or the open ocean, victims deserve a dedicated legal team to navigate these difficult waters.
section1.p2: Our firm conducts thorough investigations to determine liability, ensuring that negligent operators are held responsible for the harm they cause.

items.item2: Distractions from cell phones, loud music, or simply failing to pay attention to surroundings.
items.item4: Strongly pursuing cases where alcohol or drugs impaired the safe operation of a vessel.
items.item6: Holding manufacturers or owners accountable for poorly maintained or defective boat components.

section3.title: Experience You Can Trust
section3.p1: With over 50 years of collective legal experience, we have a proven track record of securing justice for accident victims throughout California.

content.quote: A day on the water shouldn't end in tragedy. We use our extensive experience to ensure boat operators fulfill their legal responsibility to operate safely.

profile.p1: As a founding partner of Crane Flores Injury & Car Accident Lawyers, Shannon M. Crane is an experienced Oxnard personal injury attorney and the Managing Partner of the firm. She concentrates her practice on personal injury and wrongful death cases, including automobile accidents, trucking accidents, boating accidents, medical malpractice, birth injuries, brain injuries, spinal cord injuries, dog bites, defective products, assault and battery, Jones Act (Longshoreman), and child sexual abuse.
profile.p2: With respect to community involvement, Ms. Crane has two daughters and volunteers each week at her children’s school. In addition, she sponsors events for the school, such as the I Madonnari Italian Street Painting Festival, in which students participate in chalk painting.
